characters.appearance: Cartoon brown bear with a large, rounded body. Small ears, black nose, and simple facial features.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं Supernova पर English बोलना सीख रहा हूँ। [I am learning to speak English on Supernova.]
Character A says: I love the beach! [I love the beach!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by stating the clear action (learning English on Supernova).
- Demonstrates immediate success and practice by speaking a relevant English phrase confidently.
- Establishes a cheerful, encouraging tone suitable for a quick social media ad.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
मैं Supernova पर English बोलना सीख रहा हूँ। (I am learning to speak English on Supernova.)
I love the beach! (I love the beach!)
